headline: Technical SEO score: 71% (5/7 checks passed); structured data and canonical tags need attention.

recommendations.title: Add Organization and WebSite schema markup
recommendations.rationale: No JSON-LD structured data found on homepage. Competitors all have Organization schema, enabling rich results in SERPs.

recommendations.title: Add self-referencing canonical tags
recommendations.rationale: Homepage lacks canonical tag, risking duplicate content issues with URL parameters and trailing slashes.

evidence: robots.txt: pass — found with sitemap reference.
Canonical tag: FAIL — missing on homepage.
